voice.tone: Direct and operational. Speaks to store managers.
voice.errors: Specific and actionable. Include affected item IDs. For inventory conflicts, show current vs. attempted values.
voice.loading: Table row skeletons matching column widths. Show row count estimate if available. No full-page spinners.
voice.empty_states: Practical and forward-looking. An empty orders page should say when orders will appear and link to store setup. No whimsy.
